---
image: ../images/papers/2024-kemt.png
title: "Leveraging Synthetic Monolingual Data for Fuzzy-Match Augmentation in Neural Machine Translation: A Preliminary Study"
subtitle: "KeMT Workshop, 2024"
description: "A preliminary study combining LLM-generated synthetic data, back-translation, and Neural Fuzzy Repair for legal MT."
author:
  - name: Thomas Moerman
  - name: Arda Tezcan
date: 2024-06-27
categories: [Machine Translation]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Proceedings of the First International Workshop on Knowledge-Enhanced Machine Translation (KeMT)"
google-scholar: true
---

A preliminary study on English to French legal translation. It generates synthetic French monolingual data with an LLM, back-translates it to expand the training data, then applies Neural Fuzzy Repair. Combining back-translation with fuzzy-match augmentation improves over both the baseline and fuzzy-match augmentation alone.

Research theme: [Machine translation](../research.qmd#machine-translation)
